parameters.query:
SELECT
  id,
  content_type,
  topic,
  target_keyword,
  city,
  loan_product,
  title,
  meta_title,
  meta_description,
  slug,
  content_long,
  content_short,
  cta,
  compliance_notes,
  status,
  created_at
FROM content_queue b
WHERE b.content_type = 'blog'
  AND b.status IN ('needs_review', 'approved')
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM content_queue s
    WHERE s.slug IN (
      CONCAT(b.slug, '-instagram'),
      CONCAT(b.slug, '-facebook'),
      CONCAT(b.slug, '-linkedin'),
      CONCAT(b.slug, '-gbp')
    )
  )
ORDER BY b.id ASC
LIMIT 1;
